target.name: Plantd Materials
target.founder: Nathan Silvernail, Huade Tan, Josh Dorfman

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $42M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Materials (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 1 same-sector peers exist in Materials, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.
